album.name: album

columns.name: AlbumId
columns.description: A unique identifier assigned to each album, serving as the primary key for this table. This column enables efficient lookup and retrieval of album information.

columns.name: Title
columns.description: The official title of the album, providing a concise description of the musical content. The use of VARCHAR(160) allows for titles with varying lengths, accommodating diverse album naming conventions.

columns.name: ArtistId
columns.description: A foreign key referencing the artist table, establishing a relationship between albums and their respective creators. This column enables querying and analysis of an artist's discography.

album.description: The album table represents a collection of music recordings, capturing essential information about each album. This table is part of a larger domain focused on managing and tracking musical content.

artist.name: artist

columns.name: ArtistId
columns.description: A unique identifier assigned to each artist, serving as the primary key for this table. This column is used to establish a one-to-one relationship between artists and their corresponding records.

columns.name: Name
columns.description: The name of the artist, which can be up to 120 characters in length. This column allows for varying levels of detail, from a simple first name to a full stage name or band name.

artist.description: The Artist table stores information about individual artists in a music database. This table is used to maintain a comprehensive list of artists, including their unique identifier and name.

customer.name: customer

columns.name: CustomerId
columns.description: Unique identifier for each customer.

columns.name: FirstName
columns.description: The customer's first name.

columns.name: LastName
columns.description: The customer's last name.

columns.name: Company
columns.description: The company or organization the customer represents.

columns.name: Address
columns.description: The physical address of the customer.

columns.name: City
columns.description: The city where the customer is located.

columns.name: State
columns.description: The state or province where the customer is located.

columns.name: Country
columns.description: The country where the customer is located.

columns.name: PostalCode
columns.description: The postal code or zip code for the customer's location.

columns.name: Phone
columns.description: The phone number of the customer.

columns.name: Fax
columns.description: The fax number of the customer.

columns.name: Email
columns.description: The email address of the customer.

columns.name: SupportRepId
columns.description: The ID of the support representative assigned to the customer.

customer.description: Customer information table containing details about individual customers.

employee.name: employee

columns.name: EmployeeId
columns.description: Unique identifier for each employee.

columns.name: LastName
columns.description: The last name of the employee.

columns.name: FirstName
columns.description: The first name of the employee.

columns.name: Title
columns.description: The job title or role held by the employee.

columns.name: ReportsTo
columns.description: The ID of the employee's supervisor or manager.

columns.name: BirthDate
columns.description: The date of birth for each employee.

columns.name: HireDate
columns.description: The date the employee was hired by Chinook Corporation.

columns.name: Address
columns.description: The physical address of each employee's workplace or home.

columns.name: City
columns.description: The city where the employee is based.

columns.name: State
columns.description: The province or state where the employee is based.

columns.name: Country
columns.description: The country where the employee is based.

columns.name: PostalCode
columns.description: The postal code for the employee's workplace or home.

columns.name: Phone
columns.description: The phone number of each employee.

columns.name: Fax
columns.description: The fax number of each employee.

columns.name: Email
columns.description: The email address of each employee.

employee.description: This table contains information about employees working at Chinook Corporation.

genre.name: genre

columns.name: GenreId
columns.description: A unique identifier assigned to each genre, serving as a primary key for referencing and linking related data across the music catalog system. This column enables fast lookup, retrieval, and manipulation of genre-specific information.

columns.name: Name
columns.description: A descriptive label representing the name or title of each musical genre. This column captures the essence of the genre, providing a human-readable representation for users to easily identify and navigate the music catalog system.

genre.description: The Genre table is a foundational component of the music catalog system, providing a centralized repository for categorizing and identifying various musical genres. This table enables efficient management and retrieval of genre-specific information, facilitating accurate classification and recommendation of songs, artists, and playlists.

invoice.name: invoice

columns.name: InvoiceId
columns.description: A unique identifier for each invoice, used to track and manage transactions.

columns.name: CustomerId
columns.description: The customer associated with the invoice, linking the transaction to their account.

columns.name: InvoiceDate
columns.description: The date when the invoice was issued or payment was made.

columns.name: BillingAddress
columns.description: The customer's billing address, used for shipping and communication purposes.

columns.name: BillingCity
columns.description: The city where the customer is located, used to determine regional or local taxes.

columns.name: BillingState
columns.description: The state or province where the customer is located, used for tax purposes and address validation.

columns.name: BillingCountry
columns.description: The country where the customer is located, used to determine international taxes and shipping rates.

columns.name: BillingPostalCode
columns.description: The postal code or zip code for the customer's billing address, used for shipping and address validation.

columns.name: Total
columns.description: The total amount paid by the customer for the transaction.

invoice.description: The invoice table stores information about transactions made with customers. It captures details such as the date of the transaction, the customer's billing address, and the total amount paid.

invoiceline.name: invoiceline

columns.name: InvoiceLineId
columns.description: A unique identifier for each invoice line item. This primary key ensures that each record is distinct and can be referenced independently.

columns.name: InvoiceId
columns.description: The foreign key referencing the parent Invoice table, indicating which invoice this line item belongs to.

columns.name: TrackId
columns.description: The foreign key referencing the Track table, providing context about the specific product or service being invoiced.

columns.name: UnitPrice
columns.description: The price per unit of the item being invoiced. This value is used to calculate the total cost for each line item.

columns.name: Quantity
columns.description: The number of units being invoiced for this specific line item.

invoiceline.description: This table captures detailed information about individual line items on an invoice.
invoiceline.synonyms: invoice item, order detail, transaction record

mediatype.name: mediatype

columns.name: MediaTypeId
columns.description: A unique identifier assigned to each media type. This column serves as the primary key for the table, allowing for efficient lookups and queries.
columns.synonyms: media type ID, file type code

columns.name: Name
columns.description: The human-readable name of a media type, such as 'Purchased AAC audio file' or 'AAC audio file'. This column provides a descriptive label for each media type, facilitating search and retrieval operations.
columns.synonyms: media type description, file type label

mediatype.description: The Media Type table stores information about different media formats used in a digital library or repository. This table is essential for categorizing and organizing various types of media, such as audio files, videos, images, and documents.
mediatype.synonyms: media format, file type, content type, data format

playlist.name: playlist

columns.name: PlaylistId
columns.description: A unique identifier assigned to each playlist, serving as a primary key for identifying and referencing the entity. This integer value uniquely distinguishes one playlist from another.

columns.name: Name
columns.description: The descriptive title or name given to a playlist, providing context about its content, theme, or purpose. The name can be null if the playlist does not have a designated title.

playlist.description: The Playlist table represents a collection of music tracks or audio files organized for playback or streaming. This entity captures metadata about each playlist, including its unique identifier and descriptive name.
playlist.synonyms: music playlists, audio collections, media libraries

playlisttrack.name: playlisttrack

columns.name: PlaylistId
columns.description: A unique identifier for a playlist, referencing the corresponding entry in the playlist table. This column represents the parent-child relationship between a playlist and its constituent tracks.

columns.name: TrackId
columns.description: A unique identifier for a track, referencing the corresponding entry in the track table. This column represents the association of individual songs with their respective playlists.

playlisttrack.description: The playlisttrack table serves as a bridge between the playlist and track entities, enabling the association of specific tracks with their respective playlists. This table facilitates the management of music libraries by allowing users to create custom playlists that can contain multiple tracks.
playlisttrack.synonyms: music library, media catalog, song collection

track.name: track

columns.name: TrackId
columns.description: Unique identifier for each track.

columns.name: Name
columns.description: The title of the track.

columns.name: AlbumId
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the Album table, identifying the album to which this track belongs.

columns.name: MediaTypeId
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the MediaType table, indicating the type of media (e.g., CD, digital) for this track.

columns.name: GenreId
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the Genre table, categorizing the genre or style of music for this track.

columns.name: Composer
columns.description: The person(s) credited with composing the music for this track.

columns.name: Milliseconds
columns.description: The duration of the track in milliseconds.

columns.name: Bytes
columns.description: The size of the audio file for this track in bytes.

columns.name: UnitPrice
columns.description: The price at which this track is sold or licensed.

track.description: The Track table contains information about individual audio tracks within an album.
